meaning: n.玩滚球的人,玩球戏的人,(板球的)投手
examples: He is the bowler-hatted figure in the foreground of Orpen's famous painting.
Bowler saw some companies holding back on negotiations this year to wait for a better picture of what 2010 holds.
The nation which was once regarded as a buttoned-up bunch of repressives in bowler hats is now a land of incontinent alcoholics.
The hosts found the going difficult in bowler-friendly conditions, justifying Bangladesh's decision to bowl first.
He hopes it will help the spin bowler regain his fitness following a long injury lay-off.
